restaurant.name: Tandoor

customer_reviews.quote: They serve amazing quality food at low price. They also have a wide range of veg and non-veg options so there is something for everyone.
Great place, awesome food. Kashmiri Pulao and Mughlai Chicken was authentic and too much for our taste buds… we will come back again.
It was an awesome experience here. The food was really nice including the nature of the staff. From the entry to the exit, everything was soothing for us.
Great place to have a delicious Wazwan and North Indian food. Located pretty much in the center of happenings, it’s ideal for a family meal.
Fantastic place, nice ambience, plenty of seating. The service is equally good, and the food taste covers for any minor delays during rush hours.
Excellent veg selection too. We tried the paneer tikka masala, tawa veg, tadka daal, and laccha parantha. Highly recommended!

highlights: Famed for slow-cooked authentic Mughlai curries and cashew-based gravies
Authentic clay oven (tandoor) firing up daily with natural wood charcoal
Centrally situated in Lal Chowk near the historic Palladium Cinema, Srinagar
One of Srinagar's top-rated Mughlai delivery hubs with a 4.2 star rating and 5,800+ reviews
restaurant.ambiance_description: Tandoor offers a warm, inviting casual dining environment with rustic wood aesthetics, warm amber lighting, and comfortable seating arrangement. Perfect for families and food enthusiasts, the restaurant's atmosphere is animated by the delicious aroma of tandoor specials freshly cooked in traditional charcoal clay ovens.
